title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: container-selinux bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for container-selinux is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The container-selinux package provides SELinux policies for container runtimes.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update container-selinux package to resolve OCP 4.20 issues (JIRA:RHEL-115180)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: Update container-selinux package to resolve OCP 4.20 issues

full_text:
An update for container-selinux is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The container-selinux package provides SELinux policies for container runtimes.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update container-selinux package to resolve OCP 4.20 issues (JIRA:RHEL-115180)
